heading: Omitted
label: 1300d–25 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided that a payment made to a tribe or individual would not effect eligibility for a Federal service or program or result in the reduction or denial of any service or program, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 105–387, § 6112 Stat. 3473Nov. 13, 1998
